ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Shea butter oil* (43%), water, coconut oil* (21%), rapeseed oil* (11%), salt, ALMOND* (1%), medziaga. "ekologiski ingredientai. (UK) Fat spread 75% - emulsifier (lecithin*), carrot juice*, lemon juice*, natural sunflower oil flavour. *Organic.
